name: Toasted Bread With Chocolate

source.cookbook: The Best of Fine Cooking: Breakfast
source.author: Fine Cooking

intro: pinch of salt is a sophisticated touch.
method: melts the chocolate, about 1 minute. Smooth the
chocolate with a table knife, if you want. Sprinkle
a pinch of salt on each slice and serve.
topped with fruit and vegetables is a satisfying dish.
